name: Dr. Hai Anh Tran
affiliation: Department of Computer Engineering, School of Information and Communication Technology, Hanoi University of Science and Technology
bio: His research interests include distributed systems, computer network architectures, algorithms and protocols, computer and network security, and communication systems hardware and software.
